  • En

  • Contact

Buttons

Используйте наши кастомные стили кнопок для действий в формах и диалогах с поддержкой нескольких размеров и состояний. Документация Bootstrap

Colors

Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button
Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button Button
Показать примеры кода 
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-primary rounded-pill">Button</a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-yellow rounded-pill">Button</a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-orange rounded-pill">Button</a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-red rounded-pill">Button</a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-pink rounded-pill">Button</a>

<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-gradient gradient-3 rounded-pill">Text</a>

<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-gradient gradient-5 rounded-pill">Text</a>

<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-gradient gradient-9 rounded-pill">Text</a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-gradient gradient-10 rounded-pill">Text</a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-gradient gradient-11 rounded-pill">Text</a>

<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-outline-gradient gradient-1 rounded-pill"><span>Text</span></a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-outline-gradient gradient-2 rounded-pill"><span>Text</span></a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-outline-gradient gradient-3 rounded-pill"><span>Text</span></a>

Sizes

Extra Large Large Medium
Default Small Extra Small
Показать примеры кода 
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-primary btn-elg rounded-pill">Extra Large</a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-primary btn-lg rounded-pill">Large</a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-primary btn-md rounded-pill">Medium</a>

<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-primary rounded-pill">Default</a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-primary btn-sm rounded-pill">Small</a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-primary btn-xs rounded-pill">Extra Small</a>

Shapes

Square Rounded Rounder Pill
Показать примеры кода 
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-primary rounded-0">Square</a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-primary">Rounded</a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-primary rounded-xl">Rounder</a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-primary rounded-pill">Pill</a>

Style

Solid Soft Outline Gradient Outline Gradient
Показать примеры кода 
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-primary rounded-pill">Solid</a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-soft-primary rounded-pill">Soft</a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-outline-primary rounded-pill">Outline</a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-gradient gradient-1 rounded-pill me-1 mb-2 mb-md-0">Gradient</a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-outline-gradient gradient-1 rounded-pill me-1 mb-2 mb-md-0"><span>Outline Gradient</span></a>

Circle


Показать примеры кода 
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-primary btn-lg"><i class="uil uil-check"></i></a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-primary"><i class="uil uil-check"></i></a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-primary btn-sm"><i class="uil uil-check"></i></a>

<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-soft-primary btn-lg"><i class="uil uil-check"></i></a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-soft-primary"><i class="uil uil-check"></i></a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-soft-primary btn-sm"><i class="uil uil-check"></i></a>

<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-outline-primary btn-lg"><i class="uil uil-check"></i></a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-outline-primary"><i class="uil uil-check"></i></a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-outline-primary btn-sm"><i class="uil uil-check"></i></a>

<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-gradient gradient-1 btn-lg"><i class="uil uil-check"></i></a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-gradient gradient-1"><i class="uil uil-check"></i></a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-gradient gradient-1 btn-sm"><i class="uil uil-check"></i></a>

<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-outline-gradient gradient-1 btn-lg"><i class="uil uil-check"></i></a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-outline-gradient gradient-1"><i class="uil uil-check"></i></a>
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-outline-gradient gradient-1 btn-sm"><i class="uil uil-check"></i></a>

Social

Type 1 — colored

Показать примеры кода 
<h3 class="h4 mb-3">Type 1 — colored</h3>
<div class="row g-3">
	<div class="col-md-6">
		<nav class="nav social gap-2">
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-facebook"><i class="uil uil-facebook-f"></i></a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-vk"><i class="uil uil-vk"></i></a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-telegram"><i class="uil uil-telegram"></i></a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-youtube"><i class="uil uil-youtube"></i></a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-tiktok"><i class="uil uil-tiktok"></i></a>
		</nav>
	</div>
	<div class="col-md-6">
		<nav class="nav social gap-2">
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-facebook"><i class="uil uil-facebook-f"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-vk"><i class="uil uil-vk"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-telegram"><i class="uil uil-telegram"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-youtube"><i class="uil uil-youtube"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-tiktok"><i class="uil uil-tiktok"></i></a>
		</nav>
	</div>
</div>

Type 1 — primary fill

Показать примеры кода 
<h3 class="h4 mb-3">Type 1 — primary fill</h3>
<div class="row g-3">
	<div class="col-md-6">
		<nav class="nav social gap-2">
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-primary"><i class="uil uil-facebook-f"></i></a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-primary"><i class="uil uil-vk"></i></a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-primary"><i class="uil uil-telegram"></i></a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-primary"><i class="uil uil-youtube"></i></a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-primary"><i class="uil uil-tiktok"></i></a>
		</nav>
	</div>
	<div class="col-md-6">
		<nav class="nav social gap-2">
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-primary"><i class="uil uil-facebook-f"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-primary"><i class="uil uil-vk"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-primary"><i class="uil uil-telegram"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-primary"><i class="uil uil-youtube"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-primary"><i class="uil uil-tiktok"></i></a>
		</nav>
	</div>
</div>

Type 5 — dark circles

Показать примеры кода 
<h3 class="h4 mb-3">Type 5 — dark circles</h3>
<div class="row g-3">
	<div class="col-md-6">
		<nav class="nav social gap-2">
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-dark"><i class="uil uil-facebook-f"></i></a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-dark"><i class="uil uil-vk"></i></a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-dark"><i class="uil uil-telegram"></i></a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-dark"><i class="uil uil-youtube"></i></a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-dark"><i class="uil uil-tiktok"></i></a>
		</nav>
	</div>
	<div class="col-md-6">
		<nav class="nav social gap-2">
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-dark"><i class="uil uil-facebook-f"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-dark"><i class="uil uil-vk"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-dark"><i class="uil uil-telegram"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-dark"><i class="uil uil-youtube"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-dark"><i class="uil uil-tiktok"></i></a>
		</nav>
	</div>
</div>

Type 9 — outline primary

Показать примеры кода 
<h3 class="h4 mb-3">Type 9 — outline primary</h3>
<div class="row g-3">
	<div class="col-md-6">
		<nav class="nav social gap-2">
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-facebook" data-ripple-initialized="true"><i class="uil uil-facebook-f"></i></a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-vk" data-ripple-initialized="true"><i class="uil uil-vk"></i></a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-telegram" data-ripple-initialized="true"><i class="uil uil-telegram"></i></a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-youtube" data-ripple-initialized="true"><i class="uil uil-youtube"></i></a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-tiktok" data-ripple-initialized="true"><i class="uil uil-tiktok"></i></a>
		</nav>
	</div>
	<div class="col-md-6">
		<nav class="nav social gap-2">
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-facebook"><i class="uil uil-facebook-f"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-vk"><i class="uil uil-vk"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-telegram"><i class="uil uil-telegram"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-youtube"><i class="uil uil-youtube"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-tiktok"><i class="uil uil-tiktok"></i></a>
		</nav>
	</div>
</div>

Type 8 — custom color (round)

Показать примеры кода 
<h3 class="h4 mb-3">Type 8 — custom color (round)</h3>
<div class="row g-3">
	<div class="col-md-6">
		<nav class="nav gap-2">
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-red"><i class="uil uil-facebook-f"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-red"><i class="uil uil-vk"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-red"><i class="uil uil-telegram"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-red"><i class="uil uil-youtube"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-sm btn-red"><i class="uil uil-tiktok"></i></a>
		</nav>
	</div>
	<div class="col-md-6">
		<nav class="nav gap-2">
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-red"><i class="uil uil-facebook-f"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-red"><i class="uil uil-vk"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-red"><i class="uil uil-telegram"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-red"><i class="uil uil-youtube"></i></a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-block btn-sm btn-red"><i class="uil uil-tiktok"></i></a>
		</nav>
	</div>
</div>

Type 2 — muted icons

Показать примеры кода 
<h3 class="h4 mb-3">Type 2 — muted icons</h3>
<nav class="nav social gap-2 social-muted">
	<a href="#"><i class="uil uil-facebook-f"></i></a>
	<a href="#"><i class="uil uil-vk"></i></a>
	<a href="#"><i class="uil uil-telegram"></i></a>
	<a href="#"><i class="uil uil-youtube"></i></a>
	<a href="#"><i class="uil uil-tiktok"></i></a>
</nav>

Type 3 — colored icons

Показать примеры кода 
<h3 class="h4 mb-3">Type 3 — colored icons</h3>
<nav class="nav social gap-2">
	<a href="#"><i class="uil uil-facebook-f"></i></a>
	<a href="#"><i class="uil uil-vk"></i></a>
	<a href="#"><i class="uil uil-telegram"></i></a>
	<a href="#"><i class="uil uil-youtube"></i></a>
	<a href="#"><i class="uil uil-tiktok"></i></a>
</nav>

Type 4 — white icons

Показать примеры кода 
<h3 class="h4 mb-3">Type 4 — white icons</h3>
<nav class="nav social gap-2 social-white bg-dark rounded-3 p-3">
	<a href="#"><i class="uil uil-facebook-f"></i></a>
	<a href="#"><i class="uil uil-vk"></i></a>
	<a href="#"><i class="uil uil-telegram"></i></a>
	<a href="#"><i class="uil uil-youtube"></i></a>
	<a href="#"><i class="uil uil-tiktok"></i></a>
</nav>

Type 6 — wide with labels

Facebook VK Telegram
Facebook VK Telegram
Facebook VK Telegram
Показать примеры кода 
<h3 class="h4 mb-3">Type 6 — wide with labels</h3>
<div class="row g-3">
	<div class="col-md-4">
		<nav class="nav gap-2 flex-column social flex-sm-row">
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-white border border-2 border-facebook text-facebook justify-content-between w-100 fs-16 rounded-0">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-facebook-f"></i>Facebook
			</a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-white border border-2 border-vk text-vk justify-content-between w-100 fs-16 rounded-0">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-vk"></i>VK
			</a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-white border border-2 border-telegram text-telegram justify-content-between w-100 fs-16 rounded-0">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-telegram"></i>Telegram
			</a>
		</nav>
	</div>
	<div class="col-md-4">
		<nav class="nav gap-2 flex-column social flex-sm-row">
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-white border border-2 border-facebook text-facebook justify-content-between w-100 fs-16">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-facebook-f"></i>Facebook
			</a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-white border border-2 border-vk text-vk justify-content-between w-100 fs-16">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-vk"></i>VK
			</a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-white border border-2 border-telegram text-telegram justify-content-between w-100 fs-16">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-telegram"></i>Telegram
			</a>
		</nav>
	</div>
	<div class="col-md-4">
		<nav class="nav gap-2 flex-column social flex-sm-row">
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-white border border-2 border-facebook text-facebook justify-content-between w-100 fs-16 rounded-pill">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-facebook-f"></i>Facebook
			</a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-white border border-2 border-vk text-vk justify-content-between w-100 fs-16 rounded-pill">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-vk"></i>VK
			</a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-white border border-2 border-telegram text-telegram justify-content-between w-100 fs-16 rounded-pill">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-telegram"></i>Telegram
			</a>
		</nav>
	</div>
</div>

Type 7 — colored wide

Facebook VK Telegram
Facebook VK Telegram
Facebook VK Telegram
Показать примеры кода 
<h3 class="h4 mb-3">Type 7 — colored wide</h3>
<div class="row g-3">
	<div class="col-md-4">
		<nav class="nav gap-2 flex-column flex-sm-row social-white">
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-facebook justify-content-between w-100 rounded-0">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-facebook-f"></i>Facebook
			</a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-vk justify-content-between w-100 rounded-0">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-vk"></i>VK
			</a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-telegram justify-content-between w-100 rounded-0">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-telegram"></i>Telegram
			</a>
		</nav>
	</div>
	<div class="col-md-4">
		<nav class="nav gap-2 flex-column flex-sm-row social-white">
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-facebook justify-content-between w-100">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-facebook-f"></i>Facebook
			</a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-vk justify-content-between w-100">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-vk"></i>VK
			</a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-telegram justify-content-between w-100">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-telegram"></i>Telegram
			</a>
		</nav>
	</div>
	<div class="col-md-4">
		<nav class="nav gap-2 flex-column flex-sm-row social-white">
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-facebook justify-content-between w-100 rounded-pill">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-facebook-f"></i>Facebook
			</a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-vk justify-content-between w-100 rounded-pill">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-vk"></i>VK
			</a>
			<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-telegram justify-content-between w-100 rounded-pill">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-telegram"></i>Telegram
			</a>
		</nav>
	</div>
</div>

Type 8 — custom color / style (wide)

Facebook VK Telegram
Facebook VK Telegram
Facebook VK Telegram
Показать примеры кода 
<h3 class="h4 mb-3">Type 8 — custom color / style (wide)</h3>
<div class="row g-3">
	<div class="col-md-4">
		<nav class="nav gap-2 flex-column scial flex-sm-row">
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-outline-facebook justify-content-between w-100 fs-16 rounded-0">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-facebook-f"></i>Facebook
			</a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-outline-vk justify-content-between w-100 fs-16 rounded-0">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-vk"></i>VK
			</a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-outline-telegram justify-content-between w-100 fs-16 rounded-0">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-telegram"></i>Telegram
			</a>
		</nav>
	</div>
	<div class="col-md-4">
		<nav class="nav gap-2 flex-column scial flex-sm-row">
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-outline-facebook justify-content-between w-100 fs-16">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-facebook-f"></i>Facebook
			</a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-outline-vk justify-content-between w-100 fs-16">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-vk"></i>VK
			</a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-outline-telegram justify-content-between w-100 fs-16">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-telegram"></i>Telegram
			</a>
		</nav>
	</div>
	<div class="col-md-4">
		<nav class="nav gap-2 flex-column scial flex-sm-row">
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-outline-facebook justify-content-between w-100 fs-16 rounded-pill">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-facebook-f"></i>Facebook
			</a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-outline-vk justify-content-between w-100 fs-16 rounded-pill">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-vk"></i>VK
			</a>
			<a href="#" data-ripple-initialized="true" class="btn has-ripple btn-icon btn-icon-start btn-outline-telegram justify-content-between w-100 fs-16 rounded-pill">
				<i class="fs-20 lh-1 uil uil-telegram"></i>Telegram
			</a>
		</nav>
	</div>
</div>

Icon

App Store Google Play
XS Small Default Large Extra Large
Показать примеры кода 
<a class="btn has-ripple btn-primary btn-icon btn-icon-start rounded">
 <i class="uil uil-apple"></i> App Store
</a>

<a class="btn has-ripple btn-primary btn-icon btn-icon-end rounded">
 Google Play <i class="uil uil-google-play"></i>
</a>

<a class="btn has-ripple btn-xs btn-soft-primary btn-icon btn-icon-start rounded"><i class="uil uil-star"></i> XS</a>
<a class="btn has-ripple btn-sm btn-soft-primary btn-icon btn-icon-start rounded"><i class="uil uil-heart"></i> Small</a>
<a class="btn has-ripple btn-soft-primary btn-icon btn-icon-start rounded"><i class="uil uil-phone"></i> Default</a>
<a class="btn has-ripple btn-lg btn-soft-primary btn-icon btn-icon-end rounded">Large <i class="uil uil-envelope"></i></a>
<a class="btn has-ripple btn-elg btn-soft-primary btn-icon btn-icon-end rounded">Extra Large <i class="uil uil-map-marker-alt"></i></a>

Expand

Learn More
Learn More
Показать примеры кода 
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-expand btn-primary rounded-pill">
	<i class="uil uil-arrow-right"></i>
	<span>Learn More</span>
</a>

<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-expand btn-soft-primary rounded-pill">
	<i class="uil uil-arrow-right"></i>
	<span>Learn More</span>
</a>

Play

Показать примеры кода 
<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-primary btn-play ripple">
	<i class="icn-caret-right"></i>
</a>

<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-soft-primary btn-play ripple">
	<i class="icn-caret-right"></i>
</a>

<a href="#" class="btn has-ripple btn-circle btn-red btn-play ripple">
	<i class="icn-caret-right"></i>
</a>

Создайте ваш вебсайт с Codeweber.

У нас есть все необходимоее уникального и профессионального сайта.

Заказать вебсайт
